MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold Evje for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., who is present.
Alex Merchant for Defendant Charles Macklin, who is present.

Settlement confernece held. Parties entered into signed agreement, which was filed with this court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 670 Eddy Street, #209, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
